memberdef.argsstring: (const Glue< T1, T2, glue_times > &X, const typename arma_not_cx< typename T1::elem_type >::result *junk=0)
memberdef.name: as_scalar

memberdef.argsstring: (const Glue< Glue< T1, T2, glue_times_diag >, T3, glue_times > &X)
memberdef.name: as_scalar_diag

param.type: const Glue< Glue< T1, T2, glue_times_diag >, T3, glue_times > &
